abilities.name: Butterfly Jump
abilities.text: After resolving an enemy attack action targeting this model, this model may move up to 3".

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.text: While more than 6" away from this model, enemy models cannot target it and ignore it when drawing LoS.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Pouncing Strike
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with a different enemy model within 5". Then, declare this action again, targeting that enemy model.

actions.name: Menacing Croak
actions.effects: Enemy models within range must each pass a TN 12 Wp duel or gain an Entranced token and move 3" directly away from this model.

triggers.name: "That's the Signal!"
triggers.text: All friendly models in play with the Off the Top Rope action may declare it, if able. These actions may generate actions.

triggers.name: Hoppin' and Croakin'
triggers.text: Once per activation. Place this model within 3". Then, it may declare the Menacing Croak action.

triggers.name: Free Loot
triggers.text: Remove a Scheme marker within 2" of this model.

actions.name: Leap
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Place this model anywhere within range.

triggers.name: Hidden Cache
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with this model.
